# `nise profile show`

- **Usage**: `nise profile show [-J --json] [PROFILE]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/profile/show.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/profile/show.rs)

Show the current project profile generation

## Arguments

### `[PROFILE]`

Project profile name

**Default:** `default`

## Flags

### `-J --json`

Output JSON
